name: Suzhou Cheersson Precision Metal Forming Co., Ltd.
summary: Suzhou Cheersson Precision Metal Forming Co., Ltd. produces and sells communication equipment parts. The company offers powertrain cases and shells, as well as parts for multimedia intelligent, sealing, security, and brake systems. Its products include brake control unit boxes and covers, safety buckles, safety curtain guide brackets, control boxes, airbag covers, and aluminum back covers. The company was incorporated in 2012 and is based in Suzhou, China.
